title: crataegus monogyna var. rosea
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. rosea, also known as the pink hawthorn, is a variant of the common hawthorn tree that is native to Europe, western Asia, and northwest Africa. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna var. rosea include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antidiarrheal agent. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. Crataegus monogyna var. rosea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support heart health and alleviate digestive issues.
